In a Codex environment, that path is not where Codex discovers installed skills.\n\nThere is also a second source of confusion: this repo itself is the skill, because `SKILL.md` lives at the repository root. That means GitHub-based skill installers need to install the repo root as the skill path. This is not currently documented.\n\n## Evidence\n\n- The README explicitly says the project supports Codex.\n- The install section only shows `~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow` and the Windows equivalent under `$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow`.\n- `package.json` requires Node `>=20`.\n- `SKILL.md` is at the repository root, so the repository root is the skill directory.\n\n## Verified Behavior\n\nI verified this in a Codex environment on Windows:\n\n- `git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow.git $env:USERPROFILE/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow`\n- `npm install`\n- `npm run build`\n\nThe skill was installed successfully and produced `dist/cli.js`.\n\nIf a Codex user follows the current README literally and installs to `~/.claude/skills/...`, the build succeeds, but Codex does not pick up the skill because it is looking under `~/.codex/skills/...`.\n\n## Expected Behavior\n\nThe repository should document Codex installation explicitly, including:\n\n- the correct Codex skill directory\n- the fact that the repository root is the skill directory\n- the required build step after installation\n- the Node.js version requirement for manual installs\n\n## Suggested README Additions\n\n### Codex\n\n```bash\ngit clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow.git ~/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow\ncd ~/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow\nnpm install\nnpm run build\n```\n\n### Windows PowerShell\n\n```powershell\ngit clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow.git `\n  $env:USERPROFILE\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow\n\ncd $env:USERPROFILE\\.codex\\skills\\memorytree-workflow\nnpm install\nnpm run build\n```\n\n### Note for GitHub-based skill installers\n\nBecause `SKILL.md` is at the repository root, the repository root is the skill path. For installers that support repo/path installation, this should be documented as the repo root (`.`), not a nested subdirectory.\n\n## Why this matters\n\nThe current repo structure is valid, but the missing Codex-specific installation instructions make the skill look broken from a Codex user's perspective even though the underlying implementation works.\n'@; $body | gh issue create --repo beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow --title \"Document Codex installation path and root-level skill layout\" --body-file -",
  "timeout_ms": 120000,
  "workdir": "D:\\demo1\\openmnemo"
}

Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",

token_count #194 03:58:23
total_tokens=572141
total 572141in 555305out 16836reason 10561
assistant #195 final_answer 03:58:27

意思是：我可以继续帮你把“怎么改 README”也写出来，方便作者直接照着改，或者你自己顺手提一个 PR。

通常我可以给你两种东西：

1. PR 描述文案
适合你去提 Pull Request 时粘贴到 GitHub。
会写清楚改了什么、为什么改、怎么验证。

2. README 修改草稿
直接给出一段可替换/可追加的 Markdown，比如新增一个 Codex 安装章节：
~/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow
以及 Windows PowerShell 的命令。

如果你愿意，我现在就可以直接给你一版 README patch 草稿。

Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
  35: | :speech_balloon: | **Chat Logs** | Append-only session records for full traceability |
  36: | :books: | **Knowledge** | Durable notes, specs, and architecture decisions (also stored in goals when scope-relevant) |
  37: | :inbox_tray: | **Transcripts** | Import and archive AI chat history from Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI |
  38: 
  39: All stored as plain Markdown files under `Memory/`, tracked by Git, minimal dependencies.
  40: 
  41: ## Install
  42: 
  43: ```bash
  44: git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow
  45: cd ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow && npm install && npm run build
  46: ```
  47: 
  48: On Windows (Git Bash):
  49: ```bash
  50: git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow "$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow"
  51: cd "$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow" && npm install && npm run build
  52: ```
  53: 
  54: ## Usage
  55: 
  56: In any Claude Code session, run:
  57: 
  58: ```
  59: /memorytree-workflow
  60: ```
  61: 
  62: The skill will immediately:
  63: 1. **Detect** 鈥?check if the current repo has MemoryTree installed
  64: 2. **Alert** 鈥?display pending notifications from `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`
  65: 3. **Init** 鈥?if missing, scaffold `AGENTS.md` and `Memory/` folders

assistant #221 commentary 03:59:53

我现在改 README.md 的安装章节，目标是把 Codex 路径、Windows PowerShell 命令、Node.js 要求，以及“仓库根目录就是 skill”这件事一次说清楚。

Tool Call #222 apply_patch call_4T83o8nvSKrK0VRUqICeaAfS 04:00:01
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\README.md @@ -## Install - -```bash -git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflo...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\README.md
@@
-## Install
-
-```bash
-git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow
-cd ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow && npm install && npm run build
-```
-
-On Windows (Git Bash):
-```bash
-git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow "$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow"
-cd "$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow" && npm install && npm run build
-```
+## Install
+
+Requirements:
+
+- Node.js 20+
+- npm
+
+### Claude Code
+
+```bash
+git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow
+cd ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow
+npm install
+npm run build
+```
+
+### Codex
+
+```bash
+git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow ~/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow
+cd ~/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow
+npm install
+npm run build
+```
+
+### Windows PowerShell (Codex)
+
+```powershell
+git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow.git `
+  $env:USERPROFILE\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow
+
+cd $env:USERPROFILE\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow
+npm install
+npm run build
+```
+
+### Note for GitHub-based skill installers
+
+`SKILL.md` is located at the repository root, so the repository root is the skill path. If your installer accepts a repo path, use `.` rather than a nested subdirectory.
*** End Patch

 ## Install
 
+Requirements:
+
+- Node.js 20+
+- npm
+
+### Claude Code
+
 ```bash
 git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow
-cd ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow && npm install && npm run build
+cd ~/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow

 ```
 
-On Windows (Git Bash):
+### Codex
+
 ```bash
-git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow "$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow"
-cd "$USERPROFILE/.claude/skills/memorytree-workflow" && npm install && npm run build
+git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow ~/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow
+cd ~/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow
+npm install
+npm run build
+```
+
+### Windows PowerShell (Codex)
+
+```powershell
+git clone https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow.git `
+  $env:USERPROFILE\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow
+
+cd $env:USERPROFILE\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow
+npm install
+npm run build
 ```
 
+### Note for GitHub-based skill installers
+
+`SKILL.md` is located at the repository root, so the repository root is the skill path. If your installer accepts a repo path, use `.` rather than a nested subdirectory.
+
 ## Usage

Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- memorytree-workflow: Detect, initialize, and maintain a reusable MemoryTree project-memory workspace for any code repository. On activation, immediately detect and report the repo's MemoryTree state. (file: C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)\n- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

Usage: memorytree init [options]

Initialize a MemoryTree workspace in a repository

Options:
  --root <path>          Target repository root (default: ".")
  --project-name <name>  Project name (default: "this project")
  --goal-summary <text>  Initial goal summary (default: "Describe the long-term

  --time <time>          Override time as HH:MM
  --skip-agents          Deprecated — use upgrade instead

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: # OpenMnemo [![CI](https://github.com/openmnemo/openmnemo/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/openmnemo/openmnemo...

Output:
# OpenMnemo

[![CI](https://github.com/openmnemo/openmnemo/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/openmnemo/openmnemo/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![npm](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@openmnemo/cli)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@openmnemo/cli)

Cross-platform AI conversation memory 鈥?aggregate, search, and version-control your coding sessions across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI.

> Named after Mnemosyne, the Greek goddess of memory.

## Architecture

Monorepo powered by pnpm workspaces + Turborepo.

```
packages/
  types/    @openmnemo/types    鈥?shared TypeScript interfaces
  core/     @openmnemo/core     鈥?transcript parsing, import, dedup, indexing
  sync/     @openmnemo/sync     鈥?heartbeat daemon, config, lock, background sync
  cli/      @openmnemo/cli      鈥?unified CLI (openmnemo command)
```

## Package Dependency Graph

```
@openmnemo/types
    鈫?
@openmnemo/core  (depends on types)
    鈫?
@openmnemo/sync  (depends on types + core)
    鈫?
@openmnemo/cli   (depends on types + core + sync)
```

## Supported Clients

| Client | Transcript Format | Status |
|--------|------------------|--------|
| Claude Code | JSONL | Planned |
| Codex | JSONL | Planned |
| Gemini CLI | JSON/JSONL | Planned |

## Install

```bash
npx @openmnemo/cli --help
# or
npm install -g @openmnemo/cli
```

## Features

- Multi-client transcript discovery and incremental import
- Deterministic cleaning (no model tokens spent)
- SQLite full-text search index (sql.js, zero native deps)
- Background heartbeat daemon with OS-native scheduling
- Git-based version control for conversation history
- Cross-session context recall
- Sensitive info detection (warn-only, no auto-redact)

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 20
- pnpm >= 9

## Development

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm build
pnpm test
```

## Related

- [memorytree-workflow](https://github.com/beyondchenlin/memorytree-workflow) 鈥?the Skill that powers MemoryTree project memory (upstream source)

## License

MIT

   1: #!/usr/bin/env node

   6:   toPosixPath
   7: } from "./chunk-BQ4SH5NX.js";
   8: 
   9: // src/project/scaffold.ts
  10: import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, statSync } from "fs";
  11: import { join, relative } from "path";
  12: var MEMORY_DIRS = [
  13:   "Memory/01_goals",
  14:   "Memory/02_todos",
  15:   "Memory/03_chat_logs",
  16:   "Memory/04_knowledge",
  17:   "Memory/05_archive"
  18: ];
  19: var CONTENT_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS = [
  20:   "CONTRIBUTING",
  21:   "CONTRIBUTING.md"
  22: ];
  23: var ALWAYS_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS = [
  24:   "CODEOWNERS",
  25:   ".github/CODEOWNERS",
  26:   ".github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md",
  27:   ".github/pull_request_template.md",
  28:   ".commitlintrc",
  29:   ".commitlintrc.json",
  30:   ".commitlintrc.yaml",
  31:   ".commitlintrc.yml",
  32:   ".commitlintrc.js",
  33:   ".commitlintrc.cjs",
  34:   "commitlint.config.js",
  35:   "commitlint.config.cjs",
  36:   "commitlint.config.mjs",
  37:   ".pre-commit-config.yaml",
  38:   ".pre-commit-config.yml"
  39: ];
  40: var POLICY_TEXT_PATTERNS = [
  41:   /\bpull request\b/i,
  42:   /\bmerge request\b/i,
  43:   /\bpr\b/i,
  44:   /\bbranch(?:es)?\b/i,
  45:   /\bprotected branch(?:es)?\b/i,
  46:   /\bcommit(?: message)?\b/i,
  47:   /\bconventional commit(?:s)?\b/i,
  48:   /\breview(?:er|ers)?\b/i,
  49:   /\bapproval(?:s)?\b/i,
  50:   /\bci\b/i,
  51:   /\bpipeline(?:s)?\b/i,
  52:   /\bauto-merge\b/i,
  53:   /\bpre-commit\b/i,
  54:   /\bcodeowners\b/i,
  55:   /鎷夊彇璇锋眰/,
  56:   /鍚堝苟璇锋眰/,
  57:   /鍒嗘敮/,
  58:   /鎻愪氦淇℃伅/,
  59:   /鎻愪氦鏍囬/,
  60:   /璇勫/,
  61:   /瀹℃壒/,
  62:   /娴佹按绾?,
  63:   /妫€鏌?,
  64:   /鑷姩鍚堝苟/,
  65:   /鎻愪氦瑙勮寖/
  66: ];
  67: function buildDatetime(dateValue, timeValue) {
  68:   if (dateValue && timeValue) {
  69:     return /* @__PURE__ */ new Date(`${dateValue}T${timeValue}:00`);
  70:   }
  71:   if (dateValue) {
  72:     return /* @__PURE__ */ new Date(`${dateValue}T00:00:00`);
  73:   }
  74:   if (timeValue) {
  75:     const today = /* @__PURE__ */ new Date();
  76:     const y = today.getFullYear();
  77:     const m = String(today.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
  78:     const d = String(today.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
  79:     return /* @__PURE__ */ new Date(`${y}-${m}-${d}T${timeValue}:00`);
  80:   }
  81:   return /* @__PURE__ */ new Date();
  82: }
  83: function resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot, root, localeValue) {
  84:   const templatesRoot = join(skillRoot, "assets", "templates");
  85:   const localeName = normalizeLocale(localeValue, root);
  86:   const templateDir = join(templatesRoot, localeName);
  87:   if (!existsSync(templateDir)) {
  88:     throw new Error(`unsupported locale: ${localeValue}`);
  89:   }
  90:   return templateDir;
  91: }
  92: function findExternalPolicySources(root) {
  93:   const matches = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();
  94:   for (const pattern of ALWAYS_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS) {
  95:     const p = join(root, pattern);
  96:     if (existsSync(p) && isFile(p)) {
  97:       matches.add(toPosixPath(relative(root, p)));
  98:     }
  99:   }
 100:   for (const pattern of CONTENT_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS) {
 101:     const p = join(root, pattern);
 102:     if (existsSync(p) && isFile(p) && hasPolicyContent(p)) {
 103:       matches.add(toPosixPath(relative(root, p)));
 104:     }
 105:   }
 106:   return [...matches].sort();
 107: }
 108: function hasPolicyContent(filePath) {
 109:   let text;
 110:   try {
 111:     text = readFileSync(filePath, "utf-8").toLowerCase();
 112:   } catch {
 113:     return true;
 114:   }
 115:   return POLICY_TEXT_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => pattern.test(text));
 116: }
 117: function findLatestVersion(folder, pattern) {
 118:   if (!existsSync(folder)) return null;
 119:   const versions = [];
 120:   try {
 121:     for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {
 122:       const match = pattern.exec(entry);
 123:       if (match?.[1]) {
 124:         versions.push(match[1]);
 125:       }
 126:     }
 127:   } catch {
 128:     return null;
 129:   }
 130:   return versions.length > 0 ? versions.sort().pop() : null;
 131: }
 132: function findLatestGoalFile(folder) {
 133:   const regex = /^goal_v(\d{3})_(\d{8})\.md$/;
 134:   const matches = [];
 135:   if (!existsSync(folder)) return null;
 136:   try {
 137:     for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {
 138:       const match = regex.exec(entry);
 139:       if (match) {
 140:         matches.push([match[1], match[2], join(folder, entry)]);
 141:       }
 142:     }
 143:   } catch {
 144:     return null;
 145:   }
 146:   if (matches.length === 0) return null;
 147:   matches.sort();
 148:   return matches[matches.length - 1][2];
 149: }
 150: function findLatestTodoVersion(folder, goalVersion) {
 151:   const regex = new RegExp(`^todo_v${goalVersion}_(\\d{3})_\\d{8}\\.md$`);
 152:   const versions = [];
 153:   if (!existsSync(folder)) return null;
 154:   try {
 155:     for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {
 156:       const match = regex.exec(entry);
 157:       if (match?.[1]) versions.push(match[1]);
 158:     }
 159:   } catch {
 160:     return null;

   1: #!/usr/bin/env node
   2: 
   3: // src/project/locale.ts
   4: import { existsSync, readdirSync, statSync, openSync, readSync, closeSync } from "fs";
   5: import { basename, join, extname } from "path";
   6: var TEXT_EXTENSIONS = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set([".md", ".txt"]);
   7: var CJK_RE = /[\u3400-\u4dbf\u4e00-\u9fff]/g;
   8: var LATIN_RE = /[A-Za-z]/g;
   9: var MIN_LATIN_SIGNAL = 3;
  10: function normalizeLocale(value, root) {
  11:   let normalized = (value ?? "").trim().toLowerCase();
  12:   if (normalized === "" || normalized === "auto") {
  13:     normalized = (root ? detectRepoLocale(root) : null) ?? detectSystemLocale();
  14:   }
  15:   const mapping = {
  16:     "en": "en",
  17:     "en-us": "en",
  18:     "en-gb": "en",
  19:     "zh": "zh-cn",
  20:     "zh-cn": "zh-cn",
  21:     "zh-sg": "zh-cn",
  22:     "zh-hans": "zh-cn",
  23:     "zh-hant": "zh-cn",
  24:     "zh-tw": "zh-cn",
  25:     "zh-hk": "zh-cn"
  26:   };
  27:   return mapping[normalized] ?? normalized;
  28: }
  29: function detectRepoLocale(root) {
  30:   if (!existsSync(root)) return null;
  31:   let zhScore = 0;
  32:   let enScore = 0;
  33:   for (const filePath of iterRepoTextCandidates(root)) {
  34:     const name = basename(filePath).toLowerCase();
  35:     if (name.includes("zh-cn") || name.includes("zh_cn")) {
  36:       zhScore += 12;
  37:     }
  38:     const sample = readTextSample(filePath);
  39:     if (!sample) continue;
  40:     const cjkCount = (sample.match(CJK_RE) ?? []).length;
  41:     const latinCount = (sample.match(LATIN_RE) ?? []).length;
  42:     if (cjkCount >= 8 && cjkCount >= Math.max(4, Math.floor(latinCount / 4))) {
  43:       zhScore += cjkCount;
  44:     }
  45:     if (cjkCount === 0 && latinCount >= MIN_LATIN_SIGNAL) {
  46:       enScore += Math.max(latinCount, 12);
  47:       continue;
  48:     }
  49:     if (latinCount >= 40 && latinCount >= Math.max(40, cjkCount * 4)) {
  50:       enScore += latinCount;
  51:     }
  52:   }
  53:   if (zhScore === 0 && enScore === 0) return null;
  54:   if (zhScore === 0) return "en";
  55:   if (enScore === 0) return "zh-cn";
  56:   if (zhScore >= enScore * 1.25) return "zh-cn";
  57:   if (enScore >= zhScore * 1.25) return "en";
  58:   return null;
  59: }
  60: function detectSystemLocale() {
  61:   const candidates = [
  62:     process.env["LC_ALL"],
  63:     process.env["LANG"],
  64:     process.env["LANGUAGE"]
  65:   ];
  66:   for (const candidate of candidates) {
  67:     const text = (candidate ?? "").toLowerCase();
  68:     if (text.startsWith("zh") || text.includes("chinese")) {
  69:       return "zh-cn";
  70:     }
  71:   }
  72:   return "en";
  73: }
  74: function* iterRepoTextCandidates(root) {
  75:   const seen = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();
  76:   for (const rel of ["AGENTS.md", "README.md", "README.zh-CN.md", "README.zh_CN.md"]) {
  77:     const p = join(root, rel);
  78:     if (existsSync(p) && isFile(p)) {
  79:       seen.add(p);
  80:       yield p;
  81:     }
  82:   }
  83:   const topLevel = [];
  84:   try {
  85:     for (const entry of readdirSync(root)) {
  86:       const p = join(root, entry);
  87:       if (isFile(p) && TEXT_EXTENSIONS.has(extname(p).toLowerCase()) && !seen.has(p)) {
  88:         topLevel.push(p);
  89:       }
  90:     }
  91:   } catch {
  92:   }
  93:   topLevel.sort();
  94:   for (const p of topLevel.slice(0, 8)) {
  95:     seen.add(p);
  96:     yield p;
  97:   }
  98:   const docsDir = join(root, "docs");
  99:   if (existsSync(docsDir) && isDir(docsDir)) {
 100:     let count = 0;
 101:     for (const p of walkDir(docsDir)) {
 102:       if (count >= 12) break;
 103:       if (!isFile(p) || !TEXT_EXTENSIONS.has(extname(p).toLowerCase()) || seen.has(p)) continue;
 104:       seen.add(p);
 105:       count++;
 106:       yield p;
 107:     }
 108:   }
 109: }
 110: function walkDir(dir) {
 111:   const results = [];
 112:   try {
 113:     for (const entry of readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) {
 114:       const p = join(dir, entry.name);
 115:       if (entry.isDirectory()) {
 116:         results.push(...walkDir(p));
 117:       } else if (entry.isFile()) {
 118:         results.push(p);
 119:       }
 120:     }
 121:   } catch {
 122:   }
 123:   results.sort();
 124:   return results;
 125: }
 126: function readTextSample(filePath) {
 127:   try {
 128:     const buf = Buffer.alloc(4096);
 129:     const fd = openSync(filePath, "r");
 130:     const bytesRead = readSync(fd, buf, 0, 4096, 0);
 131:     closeSync(fd);
 132:     return buf.subarray(0, bytesRead).toString("utf-8");
 133:   } catch {
 134:     return "";
 135:   }
 136: }
 137: function isFile(p) {
 138:   try {
 139:     return statSync(p).isFile();
 140:   } catch {
 141:     return false;
 142:   }
 143: }
 144: function isDir(p) {
 145:   try {
 146:     return statSync(p).isDirectory();
 147:   } catch {
 148:     return false;
 149:   }
 150: }
 151: 
 152: export {
 153:   normalizeLocale,
 154:   detectRepoLocale,
 155:   detectSystemLocale
 156: };

  14: // src/cli/cmd-init.ts
  15: import { existsSync } from "fs";
  16: import { resolve, join } from "path";
  17: function cmdInit(options) {
  18:   const root = resolve(options.root);
  19:   if (!existsSync(root)) {
  20:     process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}
  21: `);
  22:     return 1;
  23:   }
  24:   if (options.skipAgents) {
  25:     process.stderr.write(
  26:       "--skip-agents is not supported for fresh initialization. Use memorytree upgrade when preserving or merging an existing AGENTS.md.\n"
  27:     );
  28:     return 1;
  29:   }
  30:   const agentsPath = join(root, "AGENTS.md");
  31:   if (existsSync(agentsPath)) {
  32:     process.stderr.write(
  33:       "AGENTS.md already exists. Use memorytree upgrade to preserve or merge existing repo policy.\n"
  34:     );
  35:     return 1;
  36:   }
  37:   const policySources = findExternalPolicySources(root);
  38:   if (policySources.length > 0) {
  39:     const preview = policySources.slice(0, 3).join(", ") + (policySources.length > 3 ? ", ..." : "");
  40:     process.stderr.write(
  41:       `External repo policy files detected (${preview}). Use memorytree upgrade to preserve host commit and PR rules.
  42: `
  43:     );
  44:     return 1;
  45:   }
  46:   const skillRoot = resolve(new URL(import.meta.url).pathname.replace(/^\/([a-zA-Z]:)/, "$1"), "..", "..", "..");
  47:   const templates = resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot, root, options.locale);
  48:   const dt = buildDatetime(options.date, options.time);
  49:   createMemoryDirs(root);
  50:   const paths = resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt);
  51:   scaffoldContentFiles(paths, templates, options.goalSummary, options.projectName, options.force);
  52:   writeTemplate(join(templates, "agents.md"), agentsPath, options.force, {});
  53:   return 0;
  54: }
  55: export {
  56:   cmdInit
  57: };

assistant #340 commentary 04:05:13

问题找到了：init 把 skillRoot 往上多退了两层，实际上会去 C:\Users\ai\.codex\assets\templates 找模板，所以必然报错。这是明确的上游 bug。现在我按它的模板文件直接在仓库里手动 scaffold，效果和成功的 init 应该一致。

Output:
# AGENTS.md

## Read Order
- Read this file first.
- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.
- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.
- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.
- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.
- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.

## Memory Rules
- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.
- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.
- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.
- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.
- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.

## Transcript Rules
- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.
- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.
- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.
- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.
- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.
- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.

## Git Rules
- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.
- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.
- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.
- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.
- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.
- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.

## Heartbeat Rules
- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.
- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.
- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.
- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.
- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.
- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.

 187:       if (match) matches.push([match[1], match[2], join(folder, entry)]);
 188:     }
 189:   } catch {
 190:     return null;
 191:   }
 192:   if (matches.length === 0) return null;
 193:   matches.sort();
 194:   return matches[matches.length - 1][2];
 195: }
 196: function writeTemplate(templatePath, targetPath, force, values) {
 197:   if (existsSync(targetPath) && !force) return false;
 198:   let content = readFileSync(templatePath, "utf-8");
 199:   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(values)) {
 200:     content = content.replaceAll(`{{${key}}}`, value);
 201:   }
 202:   mkdirSync(join(targetPath, ".."), { recursive: true });
 203:   writeFileSync(targetPath, content, "utf-8");
 204:   return true;
 205: }
 206: function resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt) {
 207:   const y = dt.getFullYear();
 208:   const m = String(dt.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
 209:   const d = String(dt.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
 210:   const hh = String(dt.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
 211:   const mm = String(dt.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
 212:   const dateToken = `${y}${m}${d}`;
 213:   const dateLabel = `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
 214:   const timeLabel = `${hh}:${mm}`;
 215:   const chatFilename = `${y}-${m}-${d}_${hh}-${mm}.md`;
 216:   const goalDir = join(root, "Memory", "01_goals");
 217:   const todoDir = join(root, "Memory", "02_todos");
 218:   const chatDir = join(root, "Memory", "03_chat_logs");
 219:   let goalVersion = findLatestVersion(goalDir, /^goal_v(\d{3})_\d{8}\.md$/);
 220:   if (goalVersion === null) goalVersion = "001";
 221:   const prevNum = parseInt(goalVersion, 10);
 222:   const previousVersion = prevNum > 1 ? `v${String(prevNum - 1).padStart(3, "0")}` : "none";
 223:   let todoVersion = findLatestTodoVersion(todoDir, goalVersion);
 224:   if (todoVersion === null) todoVersion = "001";
 225:   const goalPath = findLatestGoalFile(goalDir) ?? join(goalDir, `goal_v${goalVersion}_${dateToken}.md`);
 226:   const todoPath = findLatestTodoFile(todoDir, goalVersion) ?? join(todoDir, `todo_v${goalVersion}_${todoVersion}_${dateToken}.md`);
 227:   const chatPath = findLatestChatLogFile(chatDir) ?? join(chatDir, chatFilename);
 228:   return {
 229:     root,
 230:     goalDir,
 231:     todoDir,
 232:     chatDir,
 233:     goalPath,
 234:     todoPath,
 235:     chatPath,
 236:     goalVersion,
 237:     todoVersion,
 238:     previousVersion,
 239:     dateLabel,
 240:     timeLabel
 241:   };
 242: }
 243: function createMemoryDirs(root) {
 244:   const created = [];
 245:   for (const rel of MEMORY_DIRS) {
 246:     const p = join(root, rel);
 247:     if (!existsSync(p)) {
 248:       created.push(toPosixPath(rel));
 249:     }
 250:     mkdirSync(p, { recursive: true });
 251:   }
 252:   return created;
 253: }
 254: function scaffoldContentFiles(paths, templates, goalSummary, projectName, force) {
 255:   const created = [];
 256:   const preserved = [];
 257:   const pairs = [
 258:     [
 259:       join(templates, "goal.md"),
 260:       paths.goalPath,
 261:       {
 262:         GOAL_VERSION: paths.goalVersion,
 263:         DATE: paths.dateLabel,
 264:         PREVIOUS_VERSION: paths.previousVersion,
 265:         GOAL_SUMMARY: goalSummary.trim()
 266:       }
 267:     ],
 268:     [
 269:       join(templates, "todo.md"),
 270:       paths.todoPath,
 271:       {
 272:         GOAL_VERSION: paths.goalVersion,
 273:         TODO_SUBVERSION: paths.todoVersion,
 274:         DATE: paths.dateLabel
 275:       }
 276:     ],
 277:     [
 278:       join(templates, "chat-log.md"),
 279:       paths.chatPath,
 280:       {

Tool Call #374 apply_patch call_C35xYBVXXrndkhGu6wJdvPLf 04:06:12
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Add File: D:\demo1\openmnemo\AGENTS.md +# AGENTS.md + +## Read Order +- Read this file first. +- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`. +- Read the late...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: D:\demo1\openmnemo\AGENTS.md
+# AGENTS.md
+
+## Read Order
+- Read this file first.
+- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.
+- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.
+- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.
+- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.
+- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.
+
+## Memory Rules
+- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.
+- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.
+- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.
+- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.
+- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.
+
+## Transcript Rules
+- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.
+- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.
+- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.
+- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.
+- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.
+- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.
+
+## Git Rules
+- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.
+- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.
+- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.
+- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.
+- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.
+- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.
+
+## Heartbeat Rules
+- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.
+- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.
+- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.
+- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.
+- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.
+- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.
*** Add File: D:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\01_goals\goal_v001_20260316.md
+# Project Goal v001
+
+## Metadata
+- Version: v001
+- Created: 2026-03-16
+- Previous: none
+
+## North Star
+Build a cross-platform AI conversation memory tool that aggregates, searches, and version-controls coding sessions across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI.
+
+## Scope
+- Define the stable objective.
+- Define constraints and non-goals.
+
+## Acceptance Signals
+- Describe the observable project-level outcomes.
+- Describe what success looks like.
+
+## Change Log
+- 2026-03-16: Initial goal version created.
*** Add File: D:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\02_todos\todo_v001_001_20260316.md
+# Project Todo
+
+## Binding
+- Goal version: goal_v001
+- Todo version: v001_001
+- Created: 2026-03-16
+- Status: active
+
+## Milestones
+- [ ] Milestone 1
+- [ ] Milestone 2
+
+## In Progress
+- Define the current execution focus.
+
+## Done
+- None yet.
+
+## Pending
+- Break down the next concrete tasks.
*** Add File: D:\demo1\openmnemo\Memory\03_chat_logs\2026-03-16_12-05.md

+
+---
+Time: 2026-03-16 12:05
+User: MemoryTree initialized for OpenMnemo.
+Assistant: Created the initial MemoryTree workspace and active files.
*** End Patch

# AGENTS.md

## Read Order
- Read this file first.
- Read the latest file in `Memory/01_goals/`.
- Read the latest todo bound to that goal in `Memory/02_todos/`.
- Read `Memory/04_knowledge/` only when needed.
- Read `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/` and transcript manifests only when needed.
- Read `Memory/03_chat_logs/` and `Memory/05_archive/` only when needed.

## Memory Rules
- Change the active goal only after explicit user confirmation of a requirement or scope change.
- Keep the active todo synchronized with the active goal.
- Append chat logs only. Never rewrite or delete prior entries.
- Keep active files concise and move stale context to knowledge or archive files.
- Treat cleaned transcript indexes as search aids. Confirm exact wording against the raw transcript archive when precision matters.

## Transcript Rules
- If transcript archival is enabled, archive transcripts by client, project, and session.
- Keep raw transcripts in both this repository's `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/` mirror and the user-level MemoryTree archive.
- Keep this repository mirror limited to transcripts that belong to the current project. Archive unrelated projects in the global MemoryTree archive only.
- Generate cleaned transcript indexes with deterministic code, not model-generated rewriting.
- Raw transcript upload permission for this repository: not set. Ask the user before the first raw transcript commit or push, then record the answer here.
- If raw transcript uploads are not approved, keep `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` unstaged and commit only cleaned transcript indexes or manifests for this repository.

## Git Rules
- Obey this repository's branch, PR, CI, review, and release rules.
- Auto-commit and push only MemoryTree-owned changes (`Memory/**` and this file when it is managed by MemoryTree), excluding `Memory/06_transcripts/raw/**` until raw transcript uploads are approved for this repository.
- Use a MemoryTree-scoped commit title. Prefer `memorytree(<scope>): <subject>`, or the repository-required equivalent such as `docs(memorytree): <subject>`.
- Use a dedicated branch and PR for MemoryTree-only changes. Enable auto-merge only when repository rules permit it.
- If a diff includes product code, shared policy files, cross-project transcript files, or unclear ownership, stop and ask the user before staging or pushing.
- When `auto_push` is enabled, the heartbeat process pushes automatically after committing. If no remote is configured or a push fails, an alert is written to `~/.memorytree/alerts.json`.

## Heartbeat Rules
- Transcript discovery, import, cleaning, and push are handled by the background heartbeat process. The model does not execute these operations.
- The model only writes chat log summaries and updates goals and todos during interactive sessions.
- If `~/.memorytree/alerts.json` contains pending notifications, display them at the start of the session.
- If `memorytree-daemon` is available but not registered on this machine, ask the user for their preferred settings and offer to run `memorytree-daemon install`.
- When the user asks to see their most recent conversation, trigger an on-demand sync for the current project, locate the latest session across all clients (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI), and generate a continuation summary.
- All interactive prompts must use plain-text questions. Do not rely on client-specific UI components.

assistant #395 final_answer 04:06:48

已经初始化好了，不过不是通过 memorytree init 成功完成的，而是我按它的模板手动 scaffold 的。原因是这个版本的 CLI 有个上游 bug：init --locale auto 和 init --locale en 都会失败，它把模板目录算错了。

当前仓库已经有这些初始化文件：

- [AGENTS.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/AGENTS.md)
- [goal_v001_20260316.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/01_goals/goal_v001_20260316.md)
- [todo_v001_001_20260316.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/02_todos/todo_v001_001_20260316.md)
- [2026-03-16_12-05.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-16_12-05.md)

同时也补齐了目录结构：

- Memory/01_goals
- Memory/02_todos
- Memory/03_chat_logs
- Memory/04_knowledge
- Memory/05_archive

现在开始，这个仓库里的 MemoryTree 工作流就可以按这些规则运行了：先读 [AGENTS.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/AGENTS.md)，再维护当前 goal、todo 和 chat log。当前这些文件还只是未提交状态，没有进 git。

如果你愿意，我下一步可以继续做两件事中的一个：
1. 帮你把这批初始化文件提交到当前仓库。
2. 再给 upstream 提一个 memorytree init 失效的 issue/PR。

task_completed #397 019cf4cf-c4c9-76a0-8f90-a036b702f60d 04:06:48
已经初始化好了，不过不是通过 `memorytree init` 成功完成的，而是我按它的模板手动 scaffold 的。原因是这个版本的 CLI 有个上游 bug：`init --locale auto` 和 `init --locale en` 都会失败，它把模板目录算错了。 当前仓库已经有这些初始化文件： - [AGENTS.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/AGENTS.md) - [goal_v001_20260316.md](D:/demo1/o...
Show task summary

已经初始化好了，不过不是通过 memorytree init 成功完成的，而是我按它的模板手动 scaffold 的。原因是这个版本的 CLI 有个上游 bug：init --locale auto 和 init --locale en 都会失败，它把模板目录算错了。

当前仓库已经有这些初始化文件：

- [AGENTS.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/AGENTS.md)
- [goal_v001_20260316.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/01_goals/goal_v001_20260316.md)
- [todo_v001_001_20260316.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/02_todos/todo_v001_001_20260316.md)
- [2026-03-16_12-05.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-16_12-05.md)

同时也补齐了目录结构：

- Memory/01_goals
- Memory/02_todos
- Memory/03_chat_logs
- Memory/04_knowledge
- Memory/05_archive

现在开始，这个仓库里的 MemoryTree 工作流就可以按这些规则运行了：先读 [AGENTS.md](D:/demo1/openmnemo/AGENTS.md)，再维护当前 goal、todo 和 chat log。当前这些文件还只是未提交状态，没有进 git。

如果你愿意，我下一步可以继续做两件事中的一个：
1. 帮你把这批初始化文件提交到当前仓库。
2. 再给 upstream 提一个 memorytree init 失效的 issue/PR。

If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.",

    "limit": 10000
  }

dist\chunk-4T3TQOIU.js.map:1:{"version":3,"sources":["../src/project/scaffold.ts"],"sourcesContent":["/**\r\n * Scaffold — directory init + template rendering.\r\n * Port of scripts/_scaffold_utils.py\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { existsSync, mkdirSync, readdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'\r\nimport { join, relative } from 'node:path'\r\n\r\nimport { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'\r\nimport { normalizeLocale } from './locale.js'\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Constants\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport const MEMORY_DIRS: readonly string[] = [\r\n  'Memory/01_goals',\r\n  'Memory/02_todos',\r\n  'Memory/03_chat_logs',\r\n  'Memory/04_knowledge',\r\n  'Memory/05_archive',\r\n]\r\n\r\nexport const CONTENT_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS: readonly string[] = [\r\n  'CONTRIBUTING',\r\n  'CONTRIBUTING.md',\r\n]\r\n\r\nexport const ALWAYS_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS: readonly string[] = [\r\n  'CODEOWNERS',\r\n  '.github/CODEOWNERS',\r\n  '.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md',\r\n  '.github/pull_request_template.md',\r\n  '.commitlintrc',\r\n  '.commitlintrc.json',\r\n  '.commitlintrc.yaml',\r\n  '.commitlintrc.yml',\r\n  '.commitlintrc.js',\r\n  '.commitlintrc.cjs',\r\n  'commitlint.config.js',\r\n  'commitlint.config.cjs',\r\n  'commitlint.config.mjs',\r\n  '.pre-commit-config.yaml',\r\n  '.pre-commit-config.yml',\r\n]\r\n\r\nconst POLICY_TEXT_PATTERNS: readonly RegExp[] = [\r\n  /\\bpull request\\b/i, /\\bmerge request\\b/i, /\\bpr\\b/i,\r\n  /\\bbranch(?:es)?\\b/i, /\\bprotected branch(?:es)?\\b/i,\r\n  /\\bcommit(?: message)?\\b/i, /\\bconventional commit(?:s)?\\b/i,\r\n  /\\breview(?:er|ers)?\\b/i, /\\bapproval(?:s)?\\b/i,\r\n  /\\bci\\b/i, /\\bpipeline(?:s)?\\b/i, /\\bauto-merge\\b/i,\r\n  /\\bpre-commit\\b/i, /\\bcodeowners\\b/i,\r\n  /拉取请求/, /合并请求/, /分支/, /提交信息/, /提交标题/,\r\n  /评审/, /审批/, /流水线/, /检查/, /自动合并/, /提交规范/,\r\n]\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Types\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport interface ScaffoldPaths {\r\n  readonly root: string\r\n  readonly goalDir: string\r\n  readonly todoDir: string\r\n  readonly chatDir: string\r\n  readonly goalPath: string\r\n  readonly todoPath: string\r\n  readonly chatPath: string\r\n  readonly goalVersion: string\r\n  readonly todoVersion: string\r\n  readonly previousVersion: string\r\n  readonly dateLabel: string\r\n  readonly timeLabel: string\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// DateTime helper\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function buildDatetime(dateValue: string, timeValue: string): Date {\r\n  if (dateValue && timeValue) {\r\n    return new Date(`${dateValue}T${timeValue}:00`)\r\n  }\r\n  if (dateValue) {\r\n    return new Date(`${dateValue}T00:00:00`)\r\n  }\r\n  if (timeValue) {\r\n    const today = new Date()\r\n    const y = today.getFullYear()\r\n    const m = String(today.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')\r\n    const d = String(today.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')\r\n    return new Date(`${y}-${m}-${d}T${timeValue}:00`)\r\n  }\r\n  return new Date()\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Template resolution\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot: string, root: string, localeValue: string): string {\r\n  const templatesRoot = join(skillRoot, 'assets', 'templates')\r\n  const localeName = normalizeLocale(localeValue, root)\r\n  const templateDir = join(templatesRoot, localeName)\r\n  if (!existsSync(templateDir)) {\r\n    throw new Error(`unsupported locale: ${localeValue}`)\r\n  }\r\n  return templateDir\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Policy detection\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function findExternalPolicySources(root: string): string[] {\r\n  const matches = new Set<string>()\r\n\r\n  for (const pattern of ALWAYS_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS) {\r\n    const p = join(root, pattern)\r\n    if (existsSync(p) && isFile(p)) {\r\n      matches.add(toPosixPath(relative(root, p)))\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  for (const pattern of CONTENT_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS) {\r\n    const p = join(root, pattern)\r\n    if (existsSync(p) && isFile(p) && hasPolicyContent(p)) {\r\n      matches.add(toPosixPath(relative(root, p)))\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return [...matches].sort()\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasPolicyContent(filePath: string): boolean {\r\n  let text: string\r\n  try {\r\n    text = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8').toLowerCase()\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return true\r\n  }\r\n  return POLICY_TEXT_PATTERNS.some(pattern => pattern.test(text))\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Version detection\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function findLatestVersion(folder: string, pattern: RegExp): string | null {\r\n  if (!existsSync(folder)) return null\r\n  const versions: string[] = []\r\n  try {\r\n    for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {\r\n      const match = pattern.exec(entry)\r\n      if (match?.[1]) {\r\n        versions.push(match[1])\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n  return versions.length > 0 ? versions.sort().pop()! : null\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function findLatestGoalFile(folder: string): string | null {\r\n  const regex = /^goal_v(\\d{3})_(\\d{8})\\.md$/\r\n  const matches: Array<[string, string, string]> = []\r\n  if (!existsSync(folder)) return null\r\n  try {\r\n    for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {\r\n      const match = regex.exec(entry)\r\n      if (match) {\r\n        matches.push([match[1]!, match[2]!, join(folder, entry)])\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n  if (matches.length === 0) return null\r\n  matches.sort()\r\n  return matches[matches.length - 1]![2]\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function findLatestTodoVersion(folder: string, goalVersion: string): string | null {\r\n  const regex = new RegExp(`^todo_v${goalVersion}_(\\\\d{3})_\\\\d{8}\\\\.md$`)\r\n  const versions: string[] = []\r\n  if (!existsSync(folder)) return null\r\n  try {\r\n    for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {\r\n      const match = regex.exec(entry)\r\n      if (match?.[1]) versions.push(match[1])\r\n    }\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n  return versions.length > 0 ? versions.sort().pop()! : null\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function findLatestTodoFile(folder: string, goalVersion: string): string | null {\r\n  const regex = new RegExp(`^todo_v${goalVersion}_(\\\\d{3})_(\\\\d{8})\\\\.md$`)\r\n  const matches: Array<[string, string, string]> = []\r\n  if (!existsSync(folder)) return null\r\n  try {\r\n    for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {\r\n      const match = regex.exec(entry)\r\n      if (match) matches.push([match[1]!, match[2]!, join(folder, entry)])\r\n    }\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n  if (matches.length === 0) return null\r\n  matches.sort()\r\n  return matches[matches.length - 1]![2]\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function findLatestChatLogFile(folder: string): string | null {\r\n  const regex = /^(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})_(\\d{2}-\\d{2})\\.md$/\r\n  const matches: Array<[string, string, string]> = []\r\n  if (!existsSync(folder)) return null\r\n  try {\r\n    for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {\r\n      const match = regex.exec(entry)\r\n      if (match) matches.push([match[1]!, match[2]!, join(folder, entry)])\r\n    }\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n  if (matches.length === 0) return null\r\n  matches.sort()\r\n  return matches[matches.length - 1]![2]\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Template writing\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function writeTemplate(\r\n  templatePath: string,\r\n  targetPath: string,\r\n  force: boolean,\r\n  values: Record<string, string>,\r\n): boolean {\r\n  if (existsSync(targetPath) && !force) return false\r\n  let content = readFileSync(templatePath, 'utf-8')\r\n  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(values)) {\r\n    content = content.replaceAll(`{{${key}}}`, value)\r\n  }\r\n  mkdirSync(join(targetPath, '..'), { recursive: true })\r\n  writeFileSync(targetPath, content, 'utf-8')\r\n  return true\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Scaffold paths\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function resolveScaffoldPaths(root: string, dt: Date): ScaffoldPaths {\r\n  const y = dt.getFullYear()\r\n  const m = String(dt.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')\r\n  const d = String(dt.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')\r\n  const hh = String(dt.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')\r\n  const mm = String(dt.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')\r\n\r\n  const dateToken = `${y}${m}${d}`\r\n  const dateLabel = `${y}-${m}-${d}`\r\n  const timeLabel = `${hh}:${mm}`\r\n  const chatFilename = `${y}-${m}-${d}_${hh}-${mm}.md`\r\n\r\n  const goalDir = join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals')\r\n  const todoDir = join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos')\r\n  const chatDir = join(root, 'Memory', '03_chat_logs')\r\n\r\n  let goalVersion = findLatestVersion(goalDir, /^goal_v(\\d{3})_\\d{8}\\.md$/)\r\n  if (goalVersion === null) goalVersion = '001'\r\n  const prevNum = parseInt(goalVersion, 10)\r\n  const previousVersion = prevNum > 1 ? `v${String(prevNum - 1).padStart(3, '0')}` : 'none'\r\n\r\n  let todoVersion = findLatestTodoVersion(todoDir, goalVersion)\r\n  if (todoVersion === null) todoVersion = '001'\r\n\r\n  const goalPath = findLatestGoalFile(goalDir) ?? join(goalDir, `goal_v${goalVersion}_${dateToken}.md`)\r\n  const todoPath = findLatestTodoFile(todoDir, goalVersion) ?? join(todoDir, `todo_v${goalVersion}_${todoVersion}_${dateToken}.md`)\r\n  const chatPath = findLatestChatLogFile(chatDir) ?? join(chatDir, chatFilename)\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    root,\r\n    goalDir,\r\n    todoDir,\r\n    chatDir,\r\n    goalPath,\r\n    todoPath,\r\n    chatPath,\r\n    goalVersion,\r\n    todoVersion,\r\n    previousVersion,\r\n    dateLabel,\r\n    timeLabel,\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Directory creation\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function createMemoryDirs(root: string): string[] {\r\n  const created: string[] = []\r\n  for (const rel of MEMORY_DIRS) {\r\n    const p = join(root, rel)\r\n    if (!existsSync(p)) {\r\n      created.push(toPosixPath(rel))\r\n    }\r\n    mkdirSync(p, { recursive: true })\r\n  }\r\n  return created\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Content scaffolding\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function scaffoldContentFiles(\r\n  paths: ScaffoldPaths,\r\n  templates: string,\r\n  goalSummary: string,\r\n  projectName: string,\r\n  force: boolean,\r\n): { created: string[]; preserved: string[] } {\r\n  const created: string[] = []\r\n  const preserved: string[] = []\r\n\r\n  const pairs: Array<[string, string, Record<string, string>]> = [\r\n    [\r\n      join(templates, 'goal.md'),\r\n      paths.goalPath,\r\n      {\r\n        GOAL_VERSION: paths.goalVersion,\r\n        DATE: paths.dateLabel,\r\n        PREVIOUS_VERSION: paths.previousVersion,\r\n        GOAL_SUMMARY: goalSummary.trim(),\r\n      },\r\n    ],\r\n    [\r\n      join(templates, 'todo.md'),\r\n      paths.todoPath,\r\n      {\r\n        GOAL_VERSION: paths.goalVersion,\r\n        TODO_SUBVERSION: paths.todoVersion,\r\n        DATE: paths.dateLabel,\r\n      },\r\n    ],\r\n    [\r\n      join(templates, 'chat-log.md'),\r\n      paths.chatPath,\r\n      {\r\n        DATE: paths.dateLabel,\r\n        TIME: paths.timeLabel,\r\n        PROJECT_NAME: projectName.trim(),\r\n      },\r\n    ],\r\n  ]\r\n\r\n  for (const [templatePath, targetPath, values] of pairs) {\r\n    if (writeTemplate(templatePath, targetPath, force, values)) {\r\n      created.push(toPosixPath(relative(paths.root, targetPath)))\r\n    } else {\r\n      preserved.push(toPosixPath(relative(paths.root, targetPath)))\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return { created, preserved }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Internal helpers\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction isFile(p: string): boolean {\r\n  try { return statSync(p).isFile() } catch { return false }\r\n}\r\n"],"mappings":";;;;;;;;;AAKA,SAAS,YAAY,WAAW,aAAa,cAAc,eAAe,gBAAgB;AAC1F,SAAS,MAAM,gBAAgB;AASxB,IAAM,cAAiC;AAAA,EAC5C;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AACF;AAEO,IAAM,iCAAoD;AAAA,EAC/D;AAAA,EACA;AACF;AAEO,IAAM,gCAAmD;AAAA,EAC9D;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AAAA,EACA;AACF;AAEA,IAAM,uBAA0C;AAAA,EAC9C;AAAA,EAAqB;AAAA,EAAsB;AAAA,EAC3C;AAAA,EAAsB;AAAA,EACtB;AAAA,EAA4B;AAAA,EAC5B;AAAA,EAA0B;AAAA,EAC1B;AAAA,EAAW;AAAA,EAAuB;AAAA,EAClC;AAAA,EAAmB;AAAA,EACnB;AAAA,EAAQ;AAAA,EAAQ;AAAA,EAAM;AAAA,EAAQ;AAAA,EAC9B;AAAA,EAAM;AAAA,EAAM;AAAA,EAAO;AAAA,EAAM;AAAA,EAAQ;AACnC;AAyBO,SAAS,cAAc,WAAmB,WAAyB;AACxE,MAAI,aAAa,WAAW;AAC1B,WAAO,oBAAI,KAAK,GAAG,SAAS,IAAI,SAAS,KAAK;AAAA,EAChD;AACA,MAAI,WAAW;AACb,WAAO,oBAAI,KAAK,GAAG,SAAS,WAAW;AAAA,EACzC;AACA,MAAI,WAAW;AACb,UAAM,QAAQ,oBAAI,KAAK;AACvB,UAAM,IAAI,MAAM,YAAY;AAC5B,UAAM,IAAI,OAAO,MAAM,SAAS,IAAI,CAAC,EAAE,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AACtD,UAAM,IAAI,OAAO,MAAM,QAAQ,CAAC,EAAE,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AACjD,WAAO,oBAAI,KAAK,GAAG,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,IAAI,SAAS,KAAK;AAAA,EAClD;AACA,SAAO,oBAAI,KAAK;AAClB;AAMO,SAAS,mBAAmB,WAAmB,MAAc,aAA6B;AAC/F,QAAM,gBAAgB,KAAK,WAAW,UAAU,WAAW;AAC3D,QAAM,aAAa,gBAAgB,aAAa,IAAI;AACpD,QAAM,cAAc,KAAK,eAAe,UAAU;AAClD,MAAI,CAAC,WAAW,WAAW,GAAG;AAC5B,UAAM,IAAI,MAAM,uBAAuB,WAAW,EAAE;AAAA,EACtD;AACA,SAAO;AACT;AAMO,SAAS,0BAA0B,MAAwB;AAChE,QAAM,UAAU,oBAAI,IAAY;AAEhC,aAAW,WAAW,+BAA+B;AACnD,UAAM,IAAI,KAAK,MAAM,OAAO;AAC5B,QAAI,WAAW,CAAC,KAAK,OAAO,CAAC,GAAG;AAC9B,cAAQ,IAAI,YAAY,SAAS,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,IAC5C;AAAA,EACF;AAEA,aAAW,WAAW,gCAAgC;AACpD,UAAM,IAAI,KAAK,MAAM,OAAO;AAC5B,QAAI,WAAW,CAAC,KAAK,OAAO,CAAC,KAAK,iBAAiB,CAAC,GAAG;AACrD,cAAQ,IAAI,YAAY,SAAS,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,IAC5C;AAAA,EACF;AAEA,SAAO,CAAC,GAAG,OAAO,EAAE,KAAK;AAC3B;AAEO,SAAS,iBAAiB,UAA2B;AAC1D,MAAI;AACJ,MAAI;AACF,WAAO,aAAa,UAAU,OAAO,EAAE,YAAY;AAAA,EACrD,QAAQ;AACN,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AACA,SAAO,qBAAqB,KAAK,aAAW,QAAQ,KAAK,IAAI,CAAC;AAChE;AAMO,SAAS,kBAAkB,QAAgB,SAAgC;AAChF,MAAI,CAAC,WAAW,MAAM,EAAG,QAAO;AAChC,QAAM,WAAqB,CAAC;AAC5B,MAAI;AACF,eAAW,SAAS,YAAY,MAAM,GAAG;AACvC,YAAM,QAAQ,QAAQ,KAAK,KAAK;AAChC,UAAI,QAAQ,CAAC,GAAG;AACd,iBAAS,KAAK,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,MACxB;AAAA,IACF;AAAA,EACF,QAAQ;AACN,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AACA,SAAO,SAAS,SAAS,IAAI,SAAS,KAAK,EAAE,IAAI,IAAK;AACxD;AAEO,SAAS,mBAAmB,QAA+B;AAChE,QAAM,QAAQ;AACd,QAAM,UAA2C,CAAC;AAClD,MAAI,CAAC,WAAW,MAAM,EAAG,QAAO;AAChC,MAAI;AACF,eAAW,SAAS,YAAY,MAAM,GAAG;AACvC,YAAM,QAAQ,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK;AAC9B,UAAI,OAAO;AACT,gBAAQ,KAAK,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,GAAI,MAAM,CAAC,GAAI,KAAK,QAAQ,KAAK,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,MAC1D;AAAA,IACF;AAAA,EACF,QAAQ;AACN,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AACA,MAAI,QAAQ,WAAW,EAAG,QAAO;AACjC,UAAQ,KAAK;AACb,SAAO,QAAQ,QAAQ,SAAS,CAAC,EAAG,CAAC;AACvC;AAEO,SAAS,sBAAsB,QAAgB,aAAoC;AACxF,QAAM,QAAQ,IAAI,OAAO,UAAU,WAAW,wBAAwB;AACtE,QAAM,WAAqB,CAAC;AAC5B,MAAI,CAAC,WAAW,MAAM,EAAG,QAAO;AAChC,MAAI;AACF,eAAW,SAAS,YAAY,MAAM,GAAG;AACvC,YAAM,QAAQ,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK;AAC9B,UAAI,QAAQ,CAAC,EAAG,UAAS,KAAK,MAAM,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,IACxC;AAAA,EACF,QAAQ;AACN,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AACA,SAAO,SAAS,SAAS,IAAI,SAAS,KAAK,EAAE,IAAI,IAAK;AACxD;AAEO,SAAS,mBAAmB,QAAgB,aAAoC;AACrF,QAAM,QAAQ,IAAI,OAAO,UAAU,WAAW,0BAA0B;AACxE,QAAM,UAA2C,CAAC;AAClD,MAAI,CAAC,WAAW,MAAM,EAAG,QAAO;AAChC,MAAI;AACF,eAAW,SAAS,YAAY,MAAM,GAAG;AACvC,YAAM,QAAQ,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK;AAC9B,UAAI,MAAO,SAAQ,KAAK,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,GAAI,MAAM,CAAC,GAAI,KAAK,QAAQ,KAAK,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,IACrE;AAAA,EACF,QAAQ;AACN,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AACA,MAAI,QAAQ,WAAW,EAAG,QAAO;AACjC,UAAQ,KAAK;AACb,SAAO,QAAQ,QAAQ,SAAS,CAAC,EAAG,CAAC;AACvC;AAEO,SAAS,sBAAsB,QAA+B;AACnE,QAAM,QAAQ;AACd,QAAM,UAA2C,CAAC;AAClD,MAAI,CAAC,WAAW,MAAM,EAAG,QAAO;AAChC,MAAI;AACF,eAAW,SAAS,YAAY,MAAM,GAAG;AACvC,YAAM,QAAQ,MAAM,KAAK,KAAK;AAC9B,UAAI,MAAO,SAAQ,KAAK,CAAC,MAAM,CAAC,GAAI,MAAM,CAAC,GAAI,KAAK,QAAQ,KAAK,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,IACrE;AAAA,EACF,QAAQ;AACN,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AACA,MAAI,QAAQ,WAAW,EAAG,QAAO;AACjC,UAAQ,KAAK;AACb,SAAO,QAAQ,QAAQ,SAAS,CAAC,EAAG,CAAC;AACvC;AAMO,SAAS,cACd,cACA,YACA,OACA,QACS;AACT,MAAI,WAAW,UAAU,KAAK,CAAC,MAAO,QAAO;AAC7C,MAAI,UAAU,aAAa,cAAc,OAAO;AAChD,aAAW,CAAC,KAAK,KAAK,KAAK,OAAO,QAAQ,MAAM,GAAG;AACjD,cAAU,QAAQ,WAAW,KAAK,GAAG,MAAM,KAAK;AAAA,EAClD;AACA,YAAU,KAAK,YAAY,IAAI,GAAG,EAAE,WAAW,KAAK,CAAC;AACrD,gBAAc,YAAY,SAAS,OAAO;AAC1C,SAAO;AACT;AAMO,SAAS,qBAAqB,MAAc,IAAyB;AAC1E,QAAM,IAAI,GAAG,YAAY;AACzB,QAAM,IAAI,OAAO,GAAG,SAAS,IAAI,CAAC,EAAE,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AACnD,QAAM,IAAI,OAAO,GAAG,QAAQ,CAAC,EAAE,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AAC9C,QAAM,KAAK,OAAO,GAAG,SAAS,CAAC,EAAE,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AAChD,QAAM,KAAK,OAAO,GAAG,WAAW,CAAC,EAAE,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG;AAElD,QAAM,YAAY,GAAG,CAAC,GAAG,CAAC,GAAG,CAAC;AAC9B,QAAM,YAAY,GAAG,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC;AAChC,QAAM,YAAY,GAAG,EAAE,IAAI,EAAE;AAC7B,QAAM,eAAe,GAAG,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,IAAI,CAAC,IAAI,EAAE,IAAI,EAAE;AAE/C,QAAM,UAAU,KAAK,MAAM,UAAU,UAAU;AAC/C,QAAM,UAAU,KAAK,MAAM,UAAU,UAAU;AAC/C,QAAM,UAAU,KAAK,MAAM,UAAU,cAAc;AAEnD,MAAI,cAAc,kBAAkB,SAAS,2BAA2B;AACxE,MAAI,gBAAgB,KAAM,eAAc;AACxC,QAAM,UAAU,SAAS,aAAa,EAAE;AACxC,QAAM,kBAAkB,UAAU,IAAI,IAAI,OAAO,UAAU,CAAC,EAAE,SAAS,GAAG,GAAG,CAAC,KAAK;AAEnF,MAAI,cAAc,sBAAsB,SAAS,WAAW;AAC5D,MAAI,gBAAgB,KAAM,eAAc;AAExC,QAAM,WAAW,mBAAmB,OAAO,KAAK,KAAK,SAAS,SAAS,WAAW,IAAI,SAAS,KAAK;AACpG,QAAM,WAAW,mBAAmB,SAAS,WAAW,KAAK,KAAK,SAAS,SAAS,WAAW,IAAI,WAAW,IAAI,SAAS,KAAK;AAChI,QAAM,WAAW,sBAAsB,OAAO,KAAK,KAAK,SAAS,YAAY;AAE7E,SAAO;AAAA,IACL;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,EACF;AACF;AAMO,SAAS,iBAAiB,MAAwB;AACvD,QAAM,UAAoB,CAAC;AAC3B,aAAW,OAAO,aAAa;AAC7B,UAAM,IAAI,KAAK,MAAM,GAAG;AACxB,QAAI,CAAC,WAAW,CAAC,GAAG;AAClB,cAAQ,KAAK,YAAY,GAAG,CAAC;AAAA,IAC/B;AACA,cAAU,GAAG,EAAE,WAAW,KAAK,CAAC;AAAA,EAClC;AACA,SAAO;AACT;AAMO,SAAS,qBACd,OACA,WACA,aACA,aACA,OAC4C;AAC5C,QAAM,UAAoB,CAAC;AAC3B,QAAM,YAAsB,CAAC;AAE7B,QAAM,QAAyD;AAAA,IAC7D;AAAA,MACE,KAAK,WAAW,SAAS;AAAA,MACzB,MAAM;AAAA,MACN;AAAA,QACE,cAAc,MAAM;AAAA,QACpB,MAAM,MAAM;AAAA,QACZ,kBAAkB,MAAM;AAAA,QACxB,cAAc,YAAY,KAAK;AAAA,MACjC;AAAA,IACF;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,MACE,KAAK,WAAW,SAAS;AAAA,MACzB,MAAM;AAAA,MACN;AAAA,QACE,cAAc,MAAM;AAAA,QACpB,iBAAiB,MAAM;AAAA,QACvB,MAAM,MAAM;AAAA,MACd;AAAA,IACF;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,MACE,KAAK,WAAW,aAAa;AAAA,MAC7B,MAAM;AAAA,MACN;AAAA,QACE,MAAM,MAAM;AAAA,QACZ,MAAM,MAAM;AAAA,QACZ,cAAc,YAAY,KAAK;AAAA,MACjC;AAAA,IACF;AAAA,EACF;AAEA,aAAW,CAAC,cAAc,YAAY,MAAM,KAAK,OAAO;AACtD,QAAI,cAAc,cAAc,YAAY,OAAO,MAAM,GAAG;AAC1D,cAAQ,KAAK,YAAY,SAAS,MAAM,MAAM,UAAU,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,IAC5D,OAAO;AACL,gBAAU,KAAK,YAAY,SAAS,MAAM,MAAM,UAAU,CAAC,CAAC;AAAA,IAC9D;AAAA,EACF;AAEA,SAAO,EAAE,SAAS,UAAU;AAC9B;AAMA,SAAS,OAAO,GAAoB;AAClC,MAAI;AAAE,WAAO,SAAS,CAAC,EAAE,OAAO;AAAA,EAAE,QAAQ;AAAE,WAAO;AAAA,EAAM;AAC3D;","names":[]}

dist\cmd-upgrade-K4L4QWRF.js.map:1:{"version":3,"sources":["../src/cli/cmd-upgrade.ts","../src/project/upgrade.ts"],"sourcesContent":["/**\r\n * CLI: memorytree upgrade — upgrade a repo to MemoryTree safely.\r\n * Port of scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py CLI wrapper.\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { existsSync } from 'node:fs'\r\nimport { resolve } from 'node:path'\r\n\r\nimport { normalizeLocale } from '../project/locale.js'\r\nimport { buildDatetime, resolveTemplateDir } from '../project/scaffold.js'\r\nimport { upgrade, formatResultText } from '../project/upgrade.js'\r\n\r\nexport interface UpgradeOptions {\r\n  root: string\r\n  projectName: string\r\n  goalSummary: string\r\n  locale: string\r\n  date: string\r\n  time: string\r\n  format: string\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function cmdUpgrade(options: UpgradeOptions): number {\r\n  const root = resolve(options.root)\r\n  if (!existsSync(root)) {\r\n    process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\\n`)\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const skillRoot = resolve(new URL(import.meta.url).pathname.replace(/^\\/([a-zA-Z]:)/, '$1'), '..', '..', '..')\r\n  const templates = resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot, root, options.locale)\r\n  const effectiveLocale = normalizeLocale(options.locale, root)\r\n  const dt = buildDatetime(options.date, options.time)\r\n\r\n  const result = upgrade(\r\n    root,\r\n    skillRoot,\r\n    templates,\r\n    effectiveLocale,\r\n    options.locale,\r\n    options.goalSummary,\r\n    options.projectName,\r\n    dt,\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  if (options.format === 'json') {\r\n    process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(result) + '\\n')\r\n  } else {\r\n    process.stdout.write(formatResultText(result) + '\\n')\r\n  }\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n","/**\r\n * Upgrade — upgrade detection + execution.\r\n * Port of scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { existsSync, readFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'\r\nimport { basename, join } from 'node:path'\r\nimport { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'\r\n\r\nimport {\r\n  createMemoryDirs,\r\n  findExternalPolicySources,\r\n  findLatestChatLogFile,\r\n  findLatestGoalFile,\r\n  findLatestTodoFile,\r\n  resolveScaffoldPaths,\r\n  scaffoldContentFiles,\r\n  writeTemplate,\r\n} from './scaffold.js'\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// State detection\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function detectState(root: string): string {\r\n  const memoryDir = join(root, 'Memory')\r\n  const goalDir = join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals')\r\n  const todoDir = join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos')\r\n  const chatDir = join(root, 'Memory', '03_chat_logs')\r\n  const agentsPath = join(root, 'AGENTS.md')\r\n  const policySources = findExternalPolicySources(root)\r\n\r\n  const latestGoal = findLatestGoalFile(goalDir)\r\n  const goalVersion = extractGoalVersion(latestGoal)\r\n  const hasGoal = latestGoal !== null\r\n  const hasTodo = goalVersion !== null && findLatestTodoFile(todoDir, goalVersion) !== null\r\n  const hasChat = findLatestChatLogFile(chatDir) !== null\r\n  const hasAgents = existsSync(agentsPath) && isFile(agentsPath)\r\n  const agentsReady = hasAgents && !needsAgentsMerge(agentsPath)\r\n\r\n  if (!existsSync(memoryDir)) {\r\n    return (hasAgents || policySources.length > 0) ? 'partial' : 'not-installed'\r\n  }\r\n  if (hasGoal && hasTodo && hasChat && agentsReady) {\r\n    return 'installed'\r\n  }\r\n  return 'partial'\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function extractGoalVersion(filePath: string | null): string | null {\r\n  if (filePath === null) return null\r\n  const name = basename(toPosixPath(filePath))\r\n  const match = /^goal_v(\\d{3})_\\d{8}\\.md$/.exec(name)\r\n  return match?.[1] ?? null\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// AGENTS.md completeness check (9 signals)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function needsAgentsMerge(agentsPath: string): boolean {\r\n  let text: string\r\n  try {\r\n    text = readFileSync(agentsPath, 'utf-8').toLowerCase()\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return true\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const checks = [\r\n    hasReadOrderSignal(text),\r\n    hasMemoryLayoutSignal(text),\r\n    hasActiveTodoRule(text),\r\n    hasAppendOnlyChatLogRule(text),\r\n    hasRepoSafetyRule(text),\r\n    hasCommitTitleRule(text),\r\n    hasDedicatedMemorytreePrFlow(text),\r\n    hasMemorytreeOnlyScopeRule(text),\r\n    hasAutoMergeRule(text),\r\n  ]\r\n  return !checks.every(Boolean)\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Signal detectors\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction matchesAny(text: string, patterns: readonly RegExp[]): boolean {\r\n  return patterns.some(p => p.test(text))\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction matchesAllConcepts(text: string, groups: readonly (readonly RegExp[])[]): boolean {\r\n  return groups.every(patterns => matchesAny(text, patterns))\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasReadOrderSignal(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAny(text, [\r\n    /\\bread order\\b/, /\\bread .* in order\\b/, /读取顺序/, /按此顺序读取/,\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasMemoryLayoutSignal(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAllConcepts(text, [\r\n    [/memory\\/01_goals/, /\\b01_goals\\b/],\r\n    [/memory\\/02_todos/, /\\b02_todos\\b/],\r\n    [/memory\\/03_chat_logs/, /\\b03_chat_logs\\b/],\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasActiveTodoRule(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAny(text, [\r\n    /keep .*todo .*synchron/,\r\n    /todo .*aligned .*active goal/,\r\n    /(sync|align|keep|maintain|bind).{0,50}(active|current).{0,20}todo.{0,50}(active|current).{0,20}goal/,\r\n    /(active|current).{0,20}todo.{0,50}(sync|align|match|bound).{0,50}(active|current).{0,20}goal/,\r\n    /当前待办必须与当前目标保持同步/,\r\n    /待办必须与当前目标保持同步/,\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasAppendOnlyChatLogRule(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAny(text, [\r\n    /append[- ]only .*chat log/,\r\n    /append[- ]only records/,\r\n    /treat chat logs as append[- ]only/,\r\n    /never rewrite or delete prior entries/,\r\n    /对话日志只追加/,\r\n    /禁止重写或删除既有内容/,\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasRepoSafetyRule(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAllConcepts(text, [\r\n    [/\\bpr\\b/, /\\bpull request\\b/, /\\bmerge request\\b/, /拉取请求/, /合并请求/],\r\n    [/\\bci\\b/, /\\bchecks?\\b/, /\\bpipeline\\b/, /\\be2e\\b/, /检查/, /流水线/],\r\n    [/\\breview(?:er|ers)?\\b/, /\\bapproval(?:s)?\\b/, /评审/, /审批/],\r\n    [/\\bbranch(?:es)?\\b/, /\\bprotected branch(?:es)?\\b/, /分支/],\r\n  ]) && matchesAny(text, [\r\n    /\\brepository\\b/, /\\brepo\\b/, /\\bproject\\b/, /\\bhost\\b/,\r\n    /\\brule(?:s)?\\b/, /\\brequirement(?:s)?\\b/, /\\bpolicy\\b/, /\\bcontrol(?:s)?\\b/,\r\n    /仓库/, /规则/, /要求/,\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasCommitTitleRule(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAny(text, [\r\n    /\\bmemorytree\\([^)]*\\):/, /\\b[a-z]+\\((memorytree)\\):/,\r\n    /\\bmemorytree:/, /memorytree-scoped commit title/,\r\n    /memorytree-specific commit title/, /use .*memorytree.*commit title/,\r\n    /提交标题.*memorytree/,\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasDedicatedMemorytreePrFlow(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAllConcepts(text, [\r\n    [/\\bmemorytree\\b/, /记忆/],\r\n    [/\\bbranch(?:es)?\\b/, /分支/],\r\n    [/\\bpr\\b/, /\\bpull request\\b/, /\\bmerge request\\b/, /拉取请求/, /合并请求/],\r\n    [/\\bdedicated\\b/, /\\bseparate\\b/, /\\bisolated\\b/, /\\bown\\b/, /专用/, /独立/],\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasMemorytreeOnlyScopeRule(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAny(text, [\r\n    /memorytree[- ]owned changes/,\r\n    /memorytree[- ]owned files/,\r\n    /memorytree-managed files/,\r\n    /(stage|push|commit).{0,40}only.{0,40}memorytree[- ]owned.{0,20}(files|changes)?/,\r\n    /(stage|push|commit).{0,40}only.{0,40}memorytree.{0,20}(files|changes|diff)/,\r\n    /only.{0,40}memorytree.{0,20}(files|changes|diff)/,\r\n    /仅自动提交和推送.*memorytree.*变更/,\r\n    /由 memorytree 管理/,\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function hasAutoMergeRule(text: string): boolean {\r\n  return matchesAny(text, [\r\n    /auto-merge only when .*permit/,\r\n    /only when repository rules permit/,\r\n    /only when repo rules permit/,\r\n    /only enable auto-merge when.{0,60}(required )?(approvals|checks|reviews?)/,\r\n    /auto-merge.{0,60}(required approvals|required checks|repository rules)/,\r\n    /仅在仓库规则允许时才开启自动合并/,\r\n  ])\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Upgrade execution\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport interface UpgradeResult {\r\n  state_before: string\r\n  state_after: string\r\n  requested_locale: string\r\n  effective_locale: string\r\n  created_dirs: string[]\r\n  created_files: string[]\r\n  preserved_files: string[]\r\n  agents_action: string\r\n  agents_merge_required: boolean\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function upgrade(\r\n  root: string,\r\n  skillRoot: string,\r\n  templates: string,\r\n  effectiveLocale: string,\r\n  requestedLocale: string,\r\n  goalSummary: string,\r\n  projectName: string,\r\n  dt: Date,\r\n): UpgradeResult {\r\n  const initialState = detectState(root)\r\n\r\n  const createdDirs = createMemoryDirs(root)\r\n  const paths = resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt)\r\n  const { created: createdFiles, preserved: preservedFiles } = scaffoldContentFiles(\r\n    paths, templates, goalSummary, projectName, false,\r\n  )\r\n\r\n  const agentsPath = join(root, 'AGENTS.md')\r\n  let agentsAction = 'preserved_existing'\r\n  if (!existsSync(agentsPath)) {\r\n    const agentsTemplate = join(templates, 'agents.md')\r\n    if (existsSync(agentsTemplate) && writeTemplate(agentsTemplate, agentsPath, false, {})) {\r\n      createdFiles.push('AGENTS.md')\r\n      agentsAction = 'created'\r\n    }\r\n  } else {\r\n    preservedFiles.push('AGENTS.md')\r\n  }\r\n  const mergeRequired = agentsAction === 'preserved_existing' && needsAgentsMerge(agentsPath)\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    state_before: initialState,\r\n    state_after: detectState(root),\r\n    requested_locale: requestedLocale,\r\n    effective_locale: effectiveLocale,\r\n    created_dirs: createdDirs,\r\n    created_files: createdFiles,\r\n    preserved_files: preservedFiles,\r\n    agents_action: agentsAction,\r\n    agents_merge_required: mergeRequired,\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function formatResultText(result: UpgradeResult): string {\r\n  const lines = [\r\n    `state_before: ${result.state_before}`,\r\n    `state_after: ${result.state_after}`,\r\n    `effective_locale: ${result.effective_locale}`,\r\n    `agents_action: ${result.agents_action}`,\r\n    `agents_merge_required: ${result.agents_merge_required}`,\r\n  ]\r\n  if (result.created_dirs.length > 0) {\r\n    lines.push('created_dirs:')\r\n    for (const item of result.created_dirs) lines.push(`- ${item}`)\r\n  }\r\n  if (result.created_files.length > 0) {\r\n    lines.push('created_files:')\r\n    for (const item of result.created_files) lines.push(`- ${item}`)\r\n  }\r\n  if (result.preserved_files.length > 0) {\r\n    lines.push('preserved_files:')\r\n    for (const item of result.preserved_files) lines.push(`- ${item}`)\r\n  }\r\n  return lines.join('\\n')\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Internal helpers\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction isFile(p: string): boolean {\r\n  try { return statSync(p).isFile() } catch { return false }\r\n}\r\n"],"mappings":";;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;AAKA,SAAS,cAAAA,mBAAkB;AAC3B,SAAS,eAAe;;;ACDxB,SAAS,YAAY,cAAc,gBAAgB;AACnD,SAAS,UAAU,YAAY;AAkBxB,SAAS,YAAY,MAAsB;AAChD,QAAM,YAAY,KAAK,MAAM,QAAQ;AACrC,QAAM,UAAU,KAAK,MAAM,UAAU,UAAU;AAC/C,QAAM,UAAU,KAAK,MAAM,UAAU,UAAU;AAC/C,QAAM,UAAU,KAAK,MAAM,UAAU,cAAc;AACnD,QAAM,aAAa,KAAK,MAAM,WAAW;AACzC,QAAM,gBAAgB,0BAA0B,IAAI;AAEpD,QAAM,aAAa,mBAAmB,OAAO;AAC7C,QAAM,cAAc,mBAAmB,UAAU;AACjD,QAAM,UAAU,eAAe;AAC/B,QAAM,UAAU,gBAAgB,QAAQ,mBAAmB,SAAS,WAAW,MAAM;AACrF,QAAM,UAAU,sBAAsB,OAAO,MAAM;AACnD,QAAM,YAAY,WAAW,UAAU,KAAK,OAAO,UAAU;AAC7D,QAAM,cAAc,aAAa,CAAC,iBAAiB,UAAU;AAE7D,MAAI,CAAC,WAAW,SAAS,GAAG;AAC1B,WAAQ,aAAa,cAAc,SAAS,IAAK,YAAY;AAAA,EAC/D;AACA,MAAI,WAAW,WAAW,WAAW,aAAa;AAChD,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AACA,SAAO;AACT;AAEO,SAAS,mBAAmB,UAAwC;AACzE,MAAI,aAAa,KAAM,QAAO;AAC9B,QAAM,OAAO,SAAS,YAAY,QAAQ,CAAC;AAC3C,QAAM,QAAQ,4BAA4B,KAAK,IAAI;AACnD,SAAO,QAAQ,CAAC,KAAK;AACvB;AAMO,SAAS,iBAAiB,YAA6B;AAC5D,MAAI;AACJ,MAAI;AACF,WAAO,aAAa,YAAY,OAAO,EAAE,YAAY;AAAA,EACvD,QAAQ;AACN,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AAEA,QAAM,SAAS;AAAA,IACb,mBAAmB,IAAI;AAAA,IACvB,sBAAsB,IAAI;AAAA,IAC1B,kBAAkB,IAAI;AAAA,IACtB,yBAAyB,IAAI;AAAA,IAC7B,kBAAkB,IAAI;AAAA,IACtB,mBAAmB,IAAI;AAAA,IACvB,6BAA6B,IAAI;AAAA,IACjC,2BAA2B,IAAI;AAAA,IAC/B,iBAAiB,IAAI;AAAA,EACvB;AACA,SAAO,CAAC,OAAO,MAAM,OAAO;AAC9B;AAMA,SAAS,WAAW,MAAc,UAAsC;AACtE,SAAO,SAAS,KAAK,OAAK,EAAE,KAAK,IAAI,CAAC;AACxC;AAEA,SAAS,mBAAmB,MAAc,QAAiD;AACzF,SAAO,OAAO,MAAM,cAAY,WAAW,MAAM,QAAQ,CAAC;AAC5D;AAEO,SAAS,mBAAmB,MAAuB;AACxD,SAAO,WAAW,MAAM;AAAA,IACtB;AAAA,IAAkB;AAAA,IAAwB;AAAA,IAAQ;AAAA,EACpD,CAAC;AACH;AAEO,SAAS,sBAAsB,MAAuB;AAC3D,SAAO,mBAAmB,MAAM;AAAA,IAC9B,CAAC,oBAAoB,cAAc;AAAA,IACnC,CAAC,oBAAoB,cAAc;AAAA,IACnC,CAAC,wBAAwB,kBAAkB;AAAA,EAC7C,CAAC;AACH;AAEO,SAAS,kBAAkB,MAAuB;AACvD,SAAO,WAAW,MAAM;AAAA,IACtB;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,EACF,CAAC;AACH;AAEO,SAAS,yBAAyB,MAAuB;AAC9D,SAAO,WAAW,MAAM;AAAA,IACtB;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,EACF,CAAC;AACH;AAEO,SAAS,kBAAkB,MAAuB;AACvD,SAAO,mBAAmB,MAAM;AAAA,IAC9B
